title: geranium repens
intro: Geranium repens, also known as creeping geranium, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of geranium repens include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep, and support the immune system. Geranium repens can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also sometimes used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
